applicableToZh: 任何可合法附魔的普通卡牌
triggerTimingEn: When the card is played
triggerTimingZh: 打出此牌时
effectSummaryEn: Grants extra Block equal to the enchant amount when played.
effectSummaryZh: 打出时额外获得等同于附魔数值的格挡。
conditionSummaryEn: A direct on-play bonus that scales with the enchant amount.
conditionSummaryZh: 属于按附魔数值缩放的直接打出奖励。
descriptionEn: Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
descriptionZh: 获得[blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。

applicableToZh: 任何可合法附魔的普通卡牌
triggerTimingEn: At Rest Sites when using card duplication
triggerTimingZh: 在休息地进行复制操作时
effectSummaryEn: Allows the card to be duplicated at Rest Sites.
effectSummaryZh: 允许这张牌在休息地被复制。
conditionSummaryEn: An out-of-combat utility enchantment with no direct combat payoff.
conditionSummaryZh: 属于战斗外收益型附魔，不直接提升单场战斗表现。
descriptionEn: This card can be duplicated at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].
descriptionZh: 这张牌可以在[gold]休息地[/gold]被复制。

applicableToZh: 仅限攻击牌
triggerTimingEn: During powered attack damage and when the card is played
triggerTimingZh: 在强化攻击伤害结算时，以及打出此牌时
effectSummaryEn: Powered attack damage is multiplied by 1.5, then the player loses 2 unblockable HP on play.
effectSummaryZh: 强化攻击伤害乘以1.5，打出后再失去2点不可格挡生命。
conditionSummaryEn: Only applies to Attack cards; non-powered attack components are not increased.
conditionSummaryZh: 仅适用于攻击牌，未被视为强化攻击的伤害部分不会提升。
descriptionEn: Deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage, but lose [blue]2[/blue] HP.
descriptionZh: 造成的伤害提高[blue]50%[/blue]，但会失去[blue]2[/blue]点生命。

applicableToZh: 不面向正常游戏流程
triggerTimingEn: No active trigger
triggerTimingZh: 没有实际触发时机
effectSummaryEn: Acts as a fallback marker for an enchantment removed from the game.
effectSummaryZh: 作为已被移除附魔的占位标记存在。
conditionSummaryEn: Placeholder only; it should not provide a positive gameplay effect.
conditionSummaryZh: 仅是兼容占位，不应提供实际正向收益。
descriptionEn: This enchantment has been removed from the game.
descriptionZh: 这个附魔已经从游戏中移除。

applicableToZh: 仅限攻击牌
triggerTimingEn: During powered attack damage calculation
triggerTimingZh: 在强化攻击伤害结算时
effectSummaryEn: Doubles the card's powered attack damage.
effectSummaryZh: 使这张牌的强化攻击伤害翻倍。
conditionSummaryEn: Only affects powered attack damage values.
conditionSummaryZh: 只影响被判定为强化攻击的伤害数值。
descriptionEn: This card's attack damage is doubled.
descriptionZh: 这张牌的攻击伤害翻倍。

applicableToZh: 任何可合法附魔的普通卡牌
triggerTimingEn: The first time this card is played each combat
triggerTimingZh: 每场战斗中第一次打出这张牌时
effectSummaryEn: Gives Replay 1 so the card is played one extra time on its first combat use.
effectSummaryZh: 赋予1次重放，让这张牌在本场首次使用时额外结算一次。
conditionSummaryEn: Disables itself after that first combat use.
conditionSummaryZh: 第一次触发后本场战斗内会失效。
descriptionEn: This card has [gold]Replay[/gold] once per combat.
descriptionZh: 这张牌每场战斗拥有一次[gold]重放[/gold]。

applicableToZh: 带有防御标签的卡牌
triggerTimingEn: When the card is played and when its Block is calculated
triggerTimingZh: 在打出此牌时，以及计算其格挡时
effectSummaryEn: Adds Exhaust and permanently increases the card's Block by 1 each time it is played.
effectSummaryZh: 赋予消耗，并在每次打出后永久让此牌的格挡提高1点。
conditionSummaryEn: Only for Defend-tag cards; the permanent growth is written back to the deck version.
conditionSummaryZh: 仅适用于防御标签牌，永久成长会同步回牌组版本。
descriptionEn: This card gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. When played, permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
descriptionZh: 这张牌获得[gold]消耗[/gold]。每次打出后，永久使这张牌的[gold]格挡[/gold]提高[blue]1[/blue]点。

applicableToZh: 仅限技能牌
triggerTimingEn: At the start of combat on round 1
triggerTimingZh: 战斗开始后的第1回合起始时
effectSummaryEn: Automatically plays the card at the start of combat.
effectSummaryZh: 让这张牌在战斗开始时自动打出。
conditionSummaryEn: Only for Skill cards; the card is placed at the bottom of the draw pile to support the autoplay flow.
conditionSummaryZh: 仅适用于技能牌，并会放在抽牌堆底部以配合自动打出流程。
descriptionEn: This card is played automatically at the start of each combat.
descriptionZh: 这张牌会在每场战斗开始时自动打出。

applicableToEn: Attack cards with base cost above 0
applicableToZh: 基础费用大于0的攻击牌
triggerTimingEn: As a permanent deck modification
triggerTimingZh: 作为永久牌组改造时生效
effectSummaryEn: Reduces the card's base cost by 1 permanently.
effectSummaryZh: 永久将这张牌的基础费用降低1点。
conditionSummaryEn: Cannot be applied to X-cost, unplayable, or already 0-cost attacks.
conditionSummaryZh: 不能附在X费、不可打出或本就0费的攻击牌上。
descriptionEn: Decrease the cost of this card by [blue]1[/blue].
descriptionZh: 使这张牌的费用减少[blue]1[/blue]点。

applicableToZh: 仅限攻击牌
triggerTimingEn: Each time this card is played during a combat
triggerTimingZh: 在一场战斗中每次打出这张牌时
effectSummaryEn: Each play increases this card's attack damage for the current combat by the enchant amount.
effectSummaryZh: 每次打出都会让这张牌在本场战斗中的攻击伤害提高附魔数值。
conditionSummaryEn: Only for Attack cards; the bonus is combat-scoped and grows with repeated plays.
conditionSummaryZh: 仅适用于攻击牌，增伤只在本场战斗内持续，并会随重复打出而累积。
descriptionEn: Increase this card's attack damage by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] this combat when played.
descriptionZh: 在本场战斗中，每次打出这张牌时，其攻击伤害提高[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点。

applicableToZh: 本身会获得格挡的卡牌
triggerTimingEn: Whenever the card grants Block
triggerTimingZh: 每当这张牌提供格挡时
effectSummaryEn: Adds flat Block equal to the enchant amount.
effectSummaryZh: 额外增加等同于附魔数值的固定格挡。
conditionSummaryEn: Only works on cards that already produce powered Block.
conditionSummaryZh: 只对原本就会产生有效格挡的卡牌生效。
descriptionEn: Increases [gold]Block[/gold] gained from this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
descriptionZh: 使这张牌获得的[gold]格挡[/gold]提高[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点。

applicableToZh: 任何可合法附魔的普通卡牌
triggerTimingEn: Whenever the card would be shuffled into the draw pile after the initial shuffle
triggerTimingZh: 在初始洗牌之后，每当此牌将被洗入抽牌堆时
effectSummaryEn: Places the card on top of the draw pile instead of shuffling it in randomly.
effectSummaryZh: 不会随机洗入，而是改为放到抽牌堆顶。
conditionSummaryEn: Does not alter the initial combat shuffle order.
conditionSummaryZh: 不会改变战斗开始时的初始洗牌顺序。
descriptionEn: Whenever this would be shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], place it on the top instead.
descriptionZh: 每当这张牌将被洗入你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]时，改为放到最上方。

applicableToZh: 攻击牌或技能牌
triggerTimingEn: As a permanent deck modification
triggerTimingZh: 作为永久牌组改造时生效
effectSummaryEn: Adds Innate and Retain to the card.
effectSummaryZh: 让这张牌同时获得固有与保留。
conditionSummaryEn: Cannot be applied to Power, Status, Curse, or Quest cards.
conditionSummaryZh: 不能附在能力牌、状态牌、诅咒牌或任务牌上。
descriptionEn: This card has [gold]Innate[/gold] and [gold]Retain[/gold].
descriptionZh: 这张牌同时拥有[gold]固有[/gold]与[gold]保留[/gold]。

applicableToZh: 仅限攻击牌
triggerTimingEn: During powered attack damage calculation
triggerTimingZh: 在强化攻击伤害结算时
effectSummaryEn: Adds flat damage equal to the enchant amount.
effectSummaryZh: 额外增加等同于附魔数值的固定伤害。
conditionSummaryEn: Only affects powered attack damage values.
conditionSummaryZh: 只影响被判定为强化攻击的伤害数值。
descriptionEn: Increases damage on this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
descriptionZh: 使这张牌的伤害提高[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点。

applicableToZh: 可打出且不是X费的卡牌
triggerTimingEn: Each time the card is drawn into hand
triggerTimingZh: 每次抽到手牌时
effectSummaryEn: Randomizes this card's cost to a value from 0 to 3 for the combat.
effectSummaryZh: 将这张牌本场战斗中的费用随机改为0到3之间的数值。
conditionSummaryEn: Cannot be applied to X-cost or unplayable cards; the cost rerolls on each draw into hand.
conditionSummaryZh: 不能附在X费或不可打出牌上，而且每次抽到手牌都会重新随机费用。
descriptionEn: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from [blue]0[/blue] to [blue]3[/blue].
descriptionZh: 当你抽到这张牌时，将其费用随机改为[blue]0[/blue]到[blue]3[/blue]之间。

applicableToZh: 任何可合法附魔的普通卡牌
triggerTimingEn: At end of turn if the card remains in hand
triggerTimingZh: 若回合结束时这张牌仍在手中
effectSummaryEn: Reduces the card's cost by 1 until it is played.
effectSummaryZh: 让这张牌的费用降低1点，直到它被打出。
conditionSummaryEn: The reduction is applied each end step while the card stays in hand, so it can stack across turns.
conditionSummaryZh: 只要它持续留在手牌中，每个回合结束都能再次降费，因此可以跨回合叠加。
descriptionEn: If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, reduce its cost by [blue]1[/blue] until it is played.
descriptionZh: 若这张牌在回合结束时仍在你手中，则将其费用降低[blue]1[/blue]点，直到它被打出。

applicableToZh: 原本带有消耗的卡牌
triggerTimingEn: As a permanent deck modification
triggerTimingZh: 作为永久牌组改造时生效
effectSummaryEn: Removes the Exhaust keyword from the card.
effectSummaryZh: 移除这张牌上的消耗关键词。
conditionSummaryEn: Can only be applied to cards that already have Exhaust.
conditionSummaryZh: 只能附在原本就具有消耗的卡牌上。
descriptionEn: This card loses [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
descriptionZh: 这张牌失去[gold]消耗[/gold]。

applicableToZh: 任何可合法附魔的普通卡牌
triggerTimingEn: The first time this card is played each combat
triggerTimingZh: 每场战斗中第一次打出这张牌时
effectSummaryEn: Grants energy equal to the enchant amount.
effectSummaryZh: 获得等同于附魔数值的能量。
conditionSummaryEn: A one-time-per-combat trigger that disables itself after firing.
conditionSummaryZh: 每场战斗只会触发一次，触发后本场失效。
descriptionEn: The first time you play this card each combat, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
descriptionZh: 每场战斗中第一次打出这张牌时，获得{Amount:energyIcons()}。

applicableToZh: 基础打击或防御牌
triggerTimingEn: Whenever the card is played
triggerTimingZh: 每次打出这张牌时
effectSummaryEn: Gives Replay 1 so the card is played one extra time every use.
effectSummaryZh: 赋予1次重放，让这张牌每次使用时都会额外结算一次。
conditionSummaryEn: Only for Basic Strike/Defend cards; unlike Glam, it does not disable after one use.
conditionSummaryZh: 仅适用于基础打击或防御牌，而且不同于Glam，它不会在首次触发后失效。
descriptionEn: This card gains [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].
descriptionZh: 这张牌获得[gold]重放[/gold][blue]1[/blue]。

applicableToZh: 任何可合法附魔的普通卡牌
triggerTimingEn: As a permanent deck modification
triggerTimingZh: 作为永久牌组改造时生效
effectSummaryEn: Adds Retain to the card.
effectSummaryZh: 让这张牌获得保留。
conditionSummaryEn: A persistent keyword upgrade with no extra combat trigger.
conditionSummaryZh: 属于持续生效的关键词强化，没有额外的战斗内触发。
descriptionEn: This card gains [gold]Retain[/gold].
descriptionZh: 这张牌获得[gold]保留[/gold]。

applicableToZh: 任何可合法附魔的普通卡牌
triggerTimingEn: The first time this card is played each combat
triggerTimingZh: 每场战斗中第一次打出这张牌时
effectSummaryEn: Draws cards equal to the enchant amount.
effectSummaryZh: 抽取等同于附魔数值的牌。
conditionSummaryEn: A one-time-per-combat trigger that disables itself after firing.
conditionSummaryZh: 每场战斗只会触发一次，触发后本场失效。
descriptionEn: The first time you play this card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
descriptionZh: 第一次打出这张牌时，抽[blue]{Amount}[/blue]张牌。

applicableToZh: 任何可合法附魔的普通卡牌
triggerTimingEn: As a permanent deck modification
triggerTimingZh: 作为永久牌组改造时生效
effectSummaryEn: Sets the card's base cost to 0 and adds Eternal.
effectSummaryZh: 将这张牌的基础费用直接改为0，并赋予永恒。
conditionSummaryEn: Applies immediately as a permanent keyword and cost upgrade.
conditionSummaryZh: 会立刻作为永久性的费用与关键词强化写入卡牌。
descriptionEn: Costs [blue]0[/blue] and gains [gold]Eternal[/gold].
descriptionZh: 费用变为[blue]0[/blue]并获得[gold]永恒[/gold]。

applicableToZh: 仅限攻击牌
triggerTimingEn: During damage calculation for the first play each combat
triggerTimingZh: 在每场战斗第一次打出时的伤害结算阶段
effectSummaryEn: The first play each combat gains extra damage equal to the enchant amount.
effectSummaryZh: 每场战斗第一次使用时，会额外获得等同于附魔数值的伤害。
conditionSummaryEn: Only for Attack cards; the bonus is disabled after that first combat use.
conditionSummaryZh: 仅适用于攻击牌，首次触发后本场战斗内会失效。
descriptionEn: The first time this card is played, it deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.
descriptionZh: 这张牌每场战斗第一次打出时，会额外造成[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点伤害。
